D:\\VOICE TO SQL\\database\\demo_busines.document:
TABLE: customers
COLUMNS:
  - customer_id (INTEGER) (PRIMARY KEY)
  - first_name (TEXT) (NOT NULL)
  - last_name (TEXT) (NOT NULL)
  - email (TEXT) (NOT NULL)
  - city (TEXT) (NOT NULL)
  - country (TEXT) (NOT NULL)
  - created_at (TEXT) (NOT NULL)
SAMPLE DATA:
  Row 1: {'customer_id': 1, 'first_name': 'Patricia', 'last_name': 'Smith', 'email': 'patricia.smith1@example-business.com', 'city': 'Mumbai', 'country': 'India', 'created_at': '2024-05-20'}
  Row 2: {'customer_id': 2, 'first_name': 'Linda', 'last_name': 'Davis', 'email': 'linda.davis2@example-business.com', 'city': 'Chicago', 'country': 'USA', 'created_at': '2025-01-12'}
  Row 3: {'customer_id': 3, 'first_name': 'Patricia', 'last_name': 'Moore', 'email': 'patricia.moore3@example-business.com', 'city': 'San Francisco', 'country': 'USA', 'created_at': '2024-10-29'}

TABLE: employees
COLUMNS:
  - employee_id (INTEGER) (PRIMARY KEY)
  - first_name (TEXT) (NOT NULL)
  - last_name (TEXT) (NOT NULL)
  - role (TEXT) (NOT NULL)
  - department (TEXT) (NOT NULL)
  - manager_id (INTEGER)
RELATIONSHIPS:
  - Column 'manager_id' references table 'employees' column 'employee_id'
SAMPLE DATA:
  Row 1: {'employee_id': 1, 'first_name': 'Sarah', 'last_name': 'Connor', 'role': 'VP Sales', 'department': 'Sales & Marketing', 'manager_id': None}
  Row 2: {'employee_id': 2, 'first_name': 'John', 'last_name': 'Doe', 'role': 'Sales Manager', 'department': 'Sales', 'manager_id': 1}
  Row 3: {'employee_id': 3, 'first_name': 'Alice', 'last_name': 'Smith', 'role': 'Sales Agent', 'department': 'Sales', 'manager_id': 2}

TABLE: products
COLUMNS:
  - product_id (INTEGER) (PRIMARY KEY)
  - product_name (TEXT) (NOT NULL)
  - category (TEXT) (NOT NULL)
  - price (REAL) (NOT NULL)
  - cost (REAL) (NOT NULL)
  - stock_quantity (INTEGER) (NOT NULL)
SAMPLE DATA:
  Row 1: {'product_id': 1, 'product_name': 'Enterprise Server S1', 'category': 'Electronics', 'price': 2499.99, 'cost': 1500.0, 'stock_quantity': 25}
  Row 2: {'product_id': 2, 'product_name': 'Developer Laptop L2', 'category': 'Electronics', 'price': 1299.99, 'cost': 800.0, 'stock_quantity': 50}
  Row 3: {'product_id': 3, 'product_name': 'Standard Office Desk', 'category': 'Furniture', 'price': 299.99, 'cost': 120.0, 'stock_quantity': 80}

TABLE: orders
COLUMNS:
  - order_id (INTEGER) (PRIMARY KEY)
  - customer_id (INTEGER) (NOT NULL)
  - employee_id (INTEGER)
  - order_date (TEXT) (NOT NULL)
  - total_amount (REAL) (NOT NULL)
RELATIONSHIPS:
  - Column 'employee_id' references table 'employees' column 'employee_id'
  - Column 'customer_id' references table 'customers' column 'customer_id'
SAMPLE DATA:
  Row 1: {'order_id': 1, 'customer_id': 24, 'employee_id': 10, 'order_date': '2025-03-26', 'total_amount': 1834.91}
  Row 2: {'order_id': 2, 'customer_id': 14, 'employee_id': 3, 'order_date': '2024-12-15', 'total_amount': 3717.86}
  Row 3: {'order_id': 3, 'customer_id': 10, 'employee_id': 10, 'order_date': '2024-08-20', 'total_amount': 13577.83}

TABLE: sales
COLUMNS:
  - sale_id (INTEGER) (PRIMARY KEY)
  - order_id (INTEGER) (NOT NULL)
  - product_id (INTEGER) (NOT NULL)
  - quantity (INTEGER) (NOT NULL)
  - unit_price (REAL) (NOT NULL)
  - discount (REAL) (NOT NULL)
  - total_revenue (REAL) (NOT NULL)
RELATIONSHIPS:
  - Column 'product_id' references table 'products' column 'product_id'
  - Column 'order_id' references table 'orders' column 'order_id'
SAMPLE DATA:
  Row 1: {'sale_id': 1, 'order_id': 1, 'product_id': 6, 'quantity': 4, 'unit_price': 89.99, 'discount': 0.0, 'total_revenue': 359.96}
  Row 2: {'sale_id': 2, 'order_id': 1, 'product_id': 4, 'quantity': 1, 'unit_price': 199.99, 'discount': 0.0, 'total_revenue': 199.99}
  Row 3: {'sale_id': 3, 'order_id': 1, 'product_id': 3, 'quantity': 2, 'unit_price': 299.99, 'discount': 0.15, 'total_revenue': 509.98}
